components.sidebar: Fixed, 260px width, white bg, right border (border-slate-200). Use extremely compact navigation links with Phosphor Icons.
components.top_header: Sticky top, h-16, white bg, bottom border. Breadcrumbs for project navigation.
components.cards: Flat, rounded-sm, border-slate-200, bg-white. No heavy drop shadows. Technical look.
components.data_tables: Dense. text-sm body, IBM Plex Mono for all numerical values (Watts, Lumens, Area). Zebra striping (even:bg-slate-50) or simple border-b on rows. Sticky headers.
components.tabs: Underline style, not pill style. border-b border-slate-200 on the list, active tab gets a 2px bottom border (border-slate-900) and text-slate-900.
components.badges: rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border.

motion.ai_processing: animate-pulse on the AI processing button, with a spinner icon.

images.description: Minimalist modern building against a blue sky. Use for login page background half-split or large empty state illustration.

icons.style: weight='regular' for standard, weight='fill' for active sidebar items.

pages_to_build: 1. Dashboard / Project List: Grid of project cards, 'Create Project' button (opens Dialog), recent activity table.
2. Project Detail View: Breadcrumb nav, Project summary stats at top (Bento grid mode B), Tabs for 'Files', 'Extracted Data', 'EDGE Status'.
3. File Upload Tab: Drag & drop zone, list of uploaded files with statuses (Pending, Processed), 'Process with AI' prominent button.
4. Extracted Data Tab: Dense Data Table (Shadcn Table) showing Filename, Parameter (Watts, Lumens), Value, Source Page, Category. Export to Excel button.
5. EDGE Status Tab: Summary cards showing total points achieved, validation badges per category (Energy, Water, Materials).

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, table rows, file upload zones, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-zone', data-testid='ai-process-button', data-testid='export-excel').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain APCA standards. Slate-500 text on white is AA compliant. Avoid pure white text on light gray.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Shadcn primitives: dialog, table, tabs, button, card, badge, input, label.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural bento-grid data layouts where possible, maintaining strict 1px borders and sharp corners (rounded-sm).
In the Results Data Table, strictly use the IBM Plex Mono font for all numerical cells to give an engineering/technical feel.
For the 'Process with AI' button, style it distinctively yet sober: dark slate background with a loading state that disables it and shows a spinner.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided Unsplash image for the empty states or authentication screens.
Add Tailwind classes directly. Don't invent new custom CSS unless strictly necessary for the custom scrollbar.
Add a custom scrollbar to the globals.css (thin, slate-300 thumb, transparent track) for a premium SaaS feel.
